best_per.description: Best phoneme accuracy. Recommended for TTS and phonetic alignment.
best_per.notes: 17.2M params. DA Loss λ=0.2 + syllable separators + structural IPA tokens (sep + stress marker). Full IPA output: includes '.' and 'ˈ'. Run 20260312_142940 is the only checkpoint.

best_wer.description: Best word accuracy. Recommended for NLP, search, word-level tasks.
best_wer.notes: 9.7M params. DA Loss λ=0.2, no syllable separators. Two checkpoints exist: 20260222_064838 (older, sweep model_index=6) and 20260310_193733 (canonical, sweep model_index=14). This alias resolves to the newer checkpoint (run_id=20260310_193733).

comparison_latphon.description: Methodological comparison with LatPhon 2025 (N=960). NOT eligible for best_per (N < 5000).
comparison_latphon.notes: Small N_test intentional: reproduces LatPhon evaluation protocol.
